g.text: Topic: definition - Backpropagation is the algorithm used to train neural networks. It works by

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: computing the gradient of the loss function with respect to each weight, using the chain rule of

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: calculus.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Chunk 2 : to each weight, using the chain rule of calculus. The network makes a prediction, the error

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: is computed, and the gradient flows

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Topic: forward+backward pass - The network makes a prediction, the error is computed, and the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: gradient flows backward through the layers. Each weight is updated in the direction that reduces

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: the error.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Chunk 3 : backward through the layers. Each weight is updated in the direction that reduces the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: error. This process repeats over many examples

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Topic: training loop - This process repeats over many examples — what we call epochs — until the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: loss converges.

g.text: Backpropagation is the algorithm used to train neural networks. It works by computing the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: gradient of the loss function with respect to each weight, using the chain rule of calculus. The

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: network makes a prediction, the error is computed, and the gradient flows backward through the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: layers. Each weight is updated in the direction that reduces the error. This process repeats over

g.text: many examples — what we call epochs — until the loss converges.

g.text: Split every N tokens regardless of sentence boundaries. Fast, simple, but can cut mid-sentence.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: ✓ Clean splits. Good for prose, but tiny chunks may lose context.

g.text: ✓✓ Best results. Chunks are semantically clear to understand. Needs more compute to index.
